blogPost.title: Samvera Connect 2025 is now a free, online conference and registration is open!

content.value: is now a free, online conference, October 28th - 30th

While we had planned to gather in Mexico City, budget cuts and travel restrictions have made it impossible for most of our community members to attend in person. So we're shifting to an online format and inviting everyone to join in.
ready to go, AND lots of slots are open for anyone in the community to share repository showcases, lightning talks, and working or interest group updates.
I invite everyone in the community to help us make the most of this event:
Samvera Connect 2025, October 28th - 30th, at no cost;

by sharing a 7-minute Repository Showcase or Lightning Talk to highlight your work, whether it is a project update, a new initiative, or a challenge you are navigating. You have the option of a live or pre-recorded presentation.
The conference will run for three hours each day in Zoom meeting format for maximum participation.
We hope you can join us for this year’s reimagined Samvera Connect!

openGraphData.og:description: Samvera™ is a vibrant and welcoming community of information and technology professionals who share challenges, build expertise, and create sustainable, best-in-class solutions, making the world’s digital collections accessible now and into the future. Samvera’s suite of repository software tools offers flexible and rich user interfaces tailored to distinct content types on top of a robust back end – giving adopters the best of both worlds.
